event_blocks.summary: The WORLD AQUATICS DIVING WORLD CUP - XI'AN 2023 commenced in a modern, flower-shaped Diving Pool Arena in Xi'an, a city rich in history and art, with a capacity of 4,000 spectators. Enthusiastic Chinese Diving Team Supporters, many in red shirts waving inflatable sticks and banners reading '中国跳水队加油!', filled the stands alongside a Woman with Two Girls observing calmly. An official announcement regarding check-in procedures preceded the event. The competition, featuring a high diving platform above a calm blue pool under bright lights, was introduced with an upbeat, dramatic instrumental music and English narration highlighting Xi'an's historical significance and the caliber of athletes, including Olympic champions Quan Hongchan and Chen Yuxi from the host nation. The Women's 10-meter synchronized platform final saw the introduction of the Chinese team, followed by the British Female Divers, Andrea Spendolini Sirieix and Lois Toulson, and the German Female Divers, sisters Lilli Klein and Lena Hahn, fostering an atmosphere of international camaraderie and anticipation as they prepared for their dives.

Woman with Two Girls.description: A woman wearing a face mask, seated with two young girls, also masked, in a quieter section of the stands; one girl holds a red inflatable stick, and they appear to be calmly observing the event.

Diving Pool Arena.description: A modern indoor aquatic center featuring a high diving platform, a large digital scoreboard displaying 'WORLD AQUATICS DIVING WORLD CUP - XI'AN 2023', and sponsor logos including OMEGA; the pool is calm and blue, reflecting bright overhead lighting, all set within an atmosphere of enthusiastic crowd cheering, applause, and an upbeat, orchestral sports theme music, with a formal male announcer introducing the teams.

Chinese Diving Team Supporters.description: A group of spectators in red shirts, actively waving inflatable sticks and holding signs with motivational Chinese phrases, creating an energetic atmosphere with their cheers during the crowd countdown and the introduction of 'Team China'.

Chinese Female Divers.description: Two female athletes, Chen Yuxi (the World Champion in Women's 10-meter platform) and Quan Hongchan (the Olympic Champion who won her title at just 14 years old), in red and blue tracksuits with 'CHN' bibs, walking onto the stage and waving to the crowd, introduced by a formal male announcer.

German Female Divers.description: Two female athletes, Lilli Klein and Lena Hahn, identified by a formal male announcer as an 'experienced pair' and 'a pair of sisters,' in white and black tracksuits with 'GER' bibs, entering the stage with a cheerful wave and displaying a relaxed demeanor.

British Female Divers.description: Two female athletes, Andrea Spendolini Sirieix and Lois Toulson, in navy blue tracksuits with 'GBR' bibs, entering the stage with smiles and acknowledging the audience, introduced by a formal male announcer.
